title: pittosporum oreophilum
intro: Pittosporum oreophilum, also known as the mountain or native forget-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of pittosporum oreophilum include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Pittosporum oreophilum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken internally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
